sentences.text: The Zawrs extension defines a pair of instructions to be used in polling loops that allows a core to enter a low-power state and wait on a store to a memory location.
sentences.section: Preamble > "Zawrs" Extension for Wait-on-Reservation-Set instructions, Version 1.01

sentences.text: Waiting for a memory location to be updated is a common pattern in many use cases such as:
sentences.section: Preamble > "Zawrs" Extension for Wait-on-Reservation-Set instructions, Version 1.01

sentences.text: Contenders for a lock waiting for the lock variable to be updated.
sentences.section: Preamble > "Zawrs" Extension for Wait-on-Reservation-Set instructions, Version 1.01

sentences.text: Consumers waiting on the tail of an empty queue for the producer to queue work/data.
sentences.section: Preamble > "Zawrs" Extension for Wait-on-Reservation-Set instructions, Version 1.01

sentences.text: The producer may be code executing on a RISC-V hart, an accelerator device, an external I/O agent.
sentences.section: Preamble > "Zawrs" Extension for Wait-on-Reservation-Set instructions, Version 1.01

sentences.text: Code waiting on a flag to be set in memory indicative of an event occurring.
sentences.section: Preamble > "Zawrs" Extension for Wait-on-Reservation-Set instructions, Version 1.01

sentences.text: For example, software on a RISC-V hart may wait on a "done" flag to be set in memory by an accelerator device indicating completion of a job previously submitted to the device.
sentences.section: Preamble > "Zawrs" Extension for Wait-on-Reservation-Set instructions, Version 1.01

sentences.text: Such use cases involve polling on memory locations, and such busy loops can be a wasteful expenditure of energy.
sentences.section: Preamble > "Zawrs" Extension for Wait-on-Reservation-Set instructions, Version 1.01

sentences.text: To mitigate the wasteful looping in such usages, a `WRS.NTO` (WRS-with-no-timeout) instruction is provided.
sentences.section: Preamble > "Zawrs" Extension for Wait-on-Reservation-Set instructions, Version 1.01

sentences.text: Instead of polling for a store to a specific memory location, software registers a reservation set that includes all the bytes of the memory location using the `LR` instruction.
sentences.section: Preamble > "Zawrs" Extension for Wait-on-Reservation-Set instructions, Version 1.01

sentences.text: Then a subsequent `WRS.NTO` instruction would cause the hart to temporarily stall execution in a low-power state until a store occurs to the reservation set or an interrupt is observed.
sentences.section: Preamble > "Zawrs" Extension for Wait-on-Reservation-Set instructions, Version 1.01

sentences.text: Sometimes the program waiting on a memory update may also need to carry out a task at a future time or otherwise place an upper bound on the wait.
sentences.section: Preamble > "Zawrs" Extension for Wait-on-Reservation-Set instructions, Version 1.01

sentences.text: To support such use cases a second instruction `WRS.STO` (WRS-with-short-timeout) is provided that works like `WRS.NTO` but bounds the stall duration to an implementation-define short timeout such that the stall is terminated on the timeout if no other conditions have occurred to terminate the stall.
sentences.section: Preamble > "Zawrs" Extension for Wait-on-Reservation-Set instructions, Version 1.01

sentences.text: The program using this instruction may then determine if its deadline has been reached.
sentences.section: Preamble > "Zawrs" Extension for Wait-on-Reservation-Set instructions, Version 1.01

sentences.text: The `WRS.NTO` and `WRS.STO` instructions cause the hart to temporarily stall execution in a low-power state as long as the reservation set is valid and no pending interrupts, even if disabled, are observed.
sentences.section: Preamble > "Zawrs" Extension for Wait-on-Reservation-Set instructions, Version 1.01 > Wait-on-Reservation-Set Instructions

sentences.text: For `WRS.STO` the stall duration is bounded by an implementation defined short timeout.
sentences.section: Preamble > "Zawrs" Extension for Wait-on-Reservation-Set instructions, Version 1.01 > Wait-on-Reservation-Set Instructions

sentences.text: These instructions are available in all privilege modes.
sentences.section: Preamble > "Zawrs" Extension for Wait-on-Reservation-Set instructions, Version 1.01 > Wait-on-Reservation-Set Instructions

sentences.text: [wavedrom, ,svg] .... {reg: [ {bits: 7, name: 'opcode', attr: ['SYSTEM(0x73)'] }, {bits: 5, name: 'rd', attr: ['0'] }, {bits: 3, name: 'funct3', attr: ['0'] }, {bits: 5, name: 'rs1', attr: ['0'] }, {bits: 12, name: 'funct12', attr:['WRS.NTO(0x0d)', 'WRS.STO(0x1d)'] }, ], config:{lanes: 1, hspace:1024}} ....
sentences.section: Preamble > "Zawrs" Extension for Wait-on-Reservation-Set instructions, Version 1.01 > Wait-on-Reservation-Set Instructions

sentences.text: Hart execution may be stalled while the following conditions are all satisfied: [loweralpha] .
sentences.section: Preamble > "Zawrs" Extension for Wait-on-Reservation-Set instructions, Version 1.01 > Wait-on-Reservation-Set Instructions

sentences.text: The reservation set is valid .
sentences.section: Preamble > "Zawrs" Extension for Wait-on-Reservation-Set instructions, Version 1.01 > Wait-on-Reservation-Set Instructions

sentences.text: If `WRS.STO`, a "short" duration since start of stall has not elapsed .
sentences.section: Preamble > "Zawrs" Extension for Wait-on-Reservation-Set instructions, Version 1.01 > Wait-on-Reservation-Set Instructions

sentences.text: No pending interrupt is observed (see the rules below)
sentences.section: Preamble > "Zawrs" Extension for Wait-on-Reservation-Set instructions, Version 1.01 > Wait-on-Reservation-Set Instructions

sentences.text: While stalled, an implementation is permitted to occasionally terminate the stall and complete execution for any reason.
sentences.section: Preamble > "Zawrs" Extension for Wait-on-Reservation-Set instructions, Version 1.01 > Wait-on-Reservation-Set Instructions

sentences.text: `WRS.NTO` and `WRS.STO` instructions follow the rules of the `WFI` instruction for resuming execution on a pending interrupt.
sentences.section: Preamble > "Zawrs" Extension for Wait-on-Reservation-Set instructions, Version 1.01 > Wait-on-Reservation-Set Instructions

sentences.text: When the `TW` (Timeout Wait) bit in `mstatus` is set and `WRS.NTO` is executed in any privilege mode other than M mode, and it does not complete within an implementation-specific bounded time limit, the `WRS.NTO` instruction will cause an illegal-instruction exception.
sentences.section: Preamble > "Zawrs" Extension for Wait-on-Reservation-Set instructions, Version 1.01 > Wait-on-Reservation-Set Instructions

sentences.text: When executing in VS or VU mode, if the `VTW` bit is set in `hstatus`, the `TW` bit in `mstatus` is clear, and the `WRS.NTO` does not complete within an implementation-specific bounded time limit, the `WRS.NTO` instruction will cause a virtual-instruction exception.
sentences.section: Preamble > "Zawrs" Extension for Wait-on-Reservation-Set instructions, Version 1.01 > Wait-on-Reservation-Set Instructions
